zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hungerford於大約1403年出生在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德時，她的父親Walter Hungerford26歲，母親Katherine Peverell21歲。她於大約1425年與Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight在英國戴文波德哈姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年12月14日在英國戴文波德哈姆享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hungerford于大约1403年出生在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德时，她的父亲Walter Hungerford26岁，母亲Katherine Peverell21岁。她于大约1425年与Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight在英国戴文波德哈姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年12月14日在英国戴文波德哈姆享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文波德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hungerford was born about 1403, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, her father, Walter Hungerford, was 26 and her mother, Katherine Peverell, was 21. She married Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight about 1425, in Powderham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 December 1476, in Powderham, Devon, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight environ 1425, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1476, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight circa 1425, nel Powderham, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hungerfordが約1403年にイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで生まれた時，父Walter Hungerfordは26歳，母Katherine Peverellは21歳であった。約1425年にイギリスデボンポウデルハムでSir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年12月14日にイギリスデボンポウデルハムで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: 영국 코른월 펜할 비 스트 오스텔
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hungerford(이)가 대략 1403년 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Hungerford(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Peverell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1425년 영국 데폰 파우더함에서 Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 12월 14일 영국 데폰 파우더함에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hungerford nasceu aproximadamente 1403, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Hungerford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Peverell, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight aproximadamente 1425, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1476, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: пенэл би ст аустелл, корнвалл, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hungerford родилась около 1403 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Hungerford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Peverell, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight около 1425 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 декабря 1476 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Hungerford nació aproximadamente 1403, en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Hungerford, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine Peverell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight aproximadamente 1425, en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1476, en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
